nasb.text: Behold, the Lord is about to hurl you headlong, O man. And He is about to grasp you firmly

esv.text: Behold, the Lord will hurl you away violently, O you strong man. He will seize firm hold on you

cnv.text: 看哪，勇士啊！耶和華將要猛烈地拋擲你； 他必把你緊緊抓住，

ccb.text: 看啊，你这有权有势的人，耶和华必紧紧抓住你，把你猛力抛开。

csbs.text: 看哪，耶和华必把你猛力抛出！你这强人哪，耶和华必把你紧紧抓住，
